G

GAME - Static variable in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.ViewRoutes
Route key for the game screen.
GameController - Class in com.example.escritura_rapida.controller
Controller for the main game screen.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.GameController
 
GameManager - Class in com.example.escritura_rapida.model
Encapsulates game state and core scoring/leveling rules.
GameManager() - Constructor for class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
Creates a new game manager with default settings.
GameStage - Class in com.example.escritura_rapida.view
Legacy stage wrapper for the game screen.
GameStage() - Constructor for class com.example.escritura_rapida.view.GameStage
Constructs and shows a standalone game stage.
getCorrectWords() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
 
getIncorrectWords() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
 
getLevel() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
 
getRandomWord() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.WordRepository
Returns a random word or a sentinel value when no words are loaded.
getRandomWord() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.WordService
Returns a random word from the current repository.
getScore() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
 
getTimeRemaining() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
 
getTotalTime() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
